name: op_no_damage_when_idle
description: PARTIAL REPAINT (the NULL case — no change ⇒ no damage): a frame with NO mutation must report NO paint damage, otherwise the window re-renders forever and burns CPU. After the mount settles, reset_frame_counters + snapshot_frame, then only advance the clock (tick_ms) and wait — no DOM/CSS/scroll/focus change at all. assert_idle_stable requires paint AND present damage to have drained to none. This is the counterpart to the partial-repaint tests: they prove a real change DOES damage, this proves a non-change does NOT.
